CSK.name: Chennai Super Kings
CSK.fan_base: One of the most passionate fan bases in IPL, known for unwavering loyalty. The Yellow Army fills Chepauk every match.
fun_facts: Only team to win IPL after returning from a 2-year ban
MS Dhoni has led CSK to 6 titles — the most by any captain
CSK has the highest win percentage in IPL history

MI.name: Mumbai Indians
MI.fan_base: Massive fan base across India, known for their comeback victories. Paltan is everywhere.
fun_facts: Only team to win 5 IPL titles
Known for slow starts and explosive finishes in the tournament
Rohit Sharma is the only player to score 6000+ IPL runs

RCB.name: Royal Challengers Bangalore
RCB.fan_base: Among the most vocal and emotional fan bases. RCB fans are known for never giving up on their team despite years of heartbreak.
fun_facts: Virat Kohli has the most runs in IPL history — all for RCB
RCB holds the record for highest team total: 263/5
Finally won their maiden title in 2024 after 17 years

KKR.name: Kolkata Knight Riders
KKR.fan_base: Eden Gardens creates one of the most electric atmospheres in world cricket. KKR fans are theatrical and passionate.
fun_facts: Shah Rukh Khan's ownership made KKR a global brand
Sunil Narine has bowled the most dot balls in IPL history
KKR won IPL 2024 in dominant fashion

RR.name: Rajasthan Royals
RR.fan_base: The original IPL winners have a cult following, especially in Rajasthan. Known for their innovative approach.
fun_facts: Won the inaugural IPL in 2008 as underdogs
Jos Buttler scored 4 centuries in IPL 2022
Known as the 'Moneyball' franchise of IPL

DC.name: Delhi Capitals
DC.fan_base: Growing fan base especially among younger fans. Delhi fans are passionate about their team's young talent.
fun_facts: Rebranded from Delhi Daredevils to Delhi Capitals in 2019
Reached their first IPL final in 2020
Rishabh Pant was the youngest IPL captain at 24

GT.name: Gujarat Titans
GT.fan_base: Newest franchise with a rapidly growing fan base. Playing at the world's largest cricket stadium gives them an incredible home advantage.
fun_facts: Won the IPL title in their debut season (2022)
Play at the 132,000-capacity Narendra Modi Stadium
Hardik Pandya led them to the title in year one

PBKS.name: Punjab Kings
PBKS.fan_base: Loyal and hopeful. Punjab fans are some of the most vocal supporters, always believing this could be their year.
fun_facts: Have never won the IPL despite being an original franchise
Consistently produce world-class pace bowlers
Known for the most dramatic chases in IPL history

SRH.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
SRH.home_ground: Rajiv Gandhi Intl Cricket Stadium, Hyderabad
SRH.fan_base: The Orange Army is one of the most organized fan groups. Hyderabad fans bring incredible energy to every home game.
fun_facts: Won IPL 2016 in David Warner's captaincy era
Travis Head's explosive batting changed SRH's DNA in 2024
SRH scored 277/3 vs MI in 2024 — highest IPL total ever

LSG.name: Lucknow Super Giants
LSG.home_ground: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium, Lucknow
LSG.fan_base: New franchise building a loyal fan base in Uttar Pradesh. Known for their strategic approach and consistent performances.
fun_facts: Reached playoffs in their debut season (2022)
KL Rahul's calm captaincy defines the team's character
Lucknow fans have embraced cricket culture rapidly
